# SDL_image vendor
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.18.0)

add_library(sdl_image_loader STATIC
  src/IMG.c
  src/IMG_WIC.c
  src/IMG_ani.c
  src/IMG_anim_encoder.c
  src/IMG_anim_decoder.c
  src/IMG_avif.c
  src/IMG_bmp.c
  src/IMG_gif.c
  src/IMG_jpg.c
  src/IMG_jxl.c
  src/IMG_lbm.c
  src/IMG_pcx.c
  src/IMG_png.c
  src/IMG_pnm.c
  src/IMG_qoi.c
  src/IMG_stb.c
  src/IMG_svg.c
  src/IMG_tga.c
  src/IMG_tif.c
  src/IMG_webp.c
  src/IMG_xcf.c
  src/IMG_xpm.c
  src/IMG_xv.c
  src/IMG_libpng.c
  src/xmlman.c
)

if(APPLE)
  target_sources(sdl_image_loader PRIVATE
    src/IMG_ImageIO.m
  )
endif()

target_include_directories(sdl_image_loader PUBLIC include)
target_link_libraries(sdl_image_loader
 PUBLIC
  webp
  webpdemux
  webpdecoder
)

if(APPLE)
  target_link_libraries(sdl_image_loader
    PUBLIC
      "-framework ImageIO"
      "-framework CoreServices"
      "-framework Foundation"
  )
endif()

target_compile_definitions(sdl_image_loader
 PRIVATE
  USE_STBIMAGE
  LOAD_PNG
  LOAD_JPG
  LOAD_BMP
  LOAD_SVG
  LOAD_GIF
  LOAD_WEBP
  SAVE_WEBP=0
)
